Personal

Life outside work

Projects, communities, and memories from 2016 to today.

Scroll through the years. Select a moment to see more.

Today

2025

LM 27 November 2025 · Memory Latte & Mocha We brought Latte and Mocha home. Visit their page →

2024

November 2024 House Photoshoot We documented the first home we made our own. View photos →
February 2024 Pre-Wedding Photoshoot We captured this chapter before our wedding. View photos →

2022

November 2022 · Build Brawl Stars Project I turned club statistics into practical gameplay insights. View repository →

2019

January–April 2019 · Community Code in the Community I taught underprivileged children basic coding skills using Scratch.
2017–2019 · Community NUS CAPTs_Lock I served on the CAPTs_Lock committee, teaching basic programming skills to students at CAPT.

2018

28–31 July 2018 · Community Orientation Week I led GAMORA in House Venus during the School of Computing's Orientation Week.
23–27 July 2018 · Community Freshmen Orientation I supported NOVA in House Phoenix during CAPT's Freshmen Orientation Camp.
January–April 2018 · Community Deaf Lightsabering I facilitated the Lightsabering with the Deaf trail at Community Engagement Fest.

2017

2016–2017 · Service Naval Diving Unit I completed National Service with the Naval Diving Unit. View memories →
